/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sequencer12.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/sequencer12.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sequencer12.dir/app/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sequencer12.dir/core/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sequencer12.dir/devices/sequencer/sequencer_device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sequencer12.dir/devices/sequencer/pattern_bank.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sequencer12.dir/devices/sequencer/arp_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sequencer12.dir/devices/sequencer/chords/chord_library.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sequencer12.dir/devices/sequencer/chords/user_chords.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sequencer12.dir/platform/midi/midi_clock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sequencer12.dir/platform/midi/midi_parser.cpp.o -o sequencer12
